title: JOIN + INTERSECT query results are inconsistent: INNER JOIN returns rows but INTERSECT returns the empty set.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT NOT NULL, c1 VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO t2(c0, c1) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, NULL), (3, 'example');
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 FLOAT NOT NULL, c1 DECIMAL(10,2));
SELECT DISTINCT t2.c0 FROM t2 INNER JOIN t3 ON t2.c0 = CAST(t3.c0 AS INTEGER);
key_bug_features: JOIN and INTERSECT produce inconsistent query results
